title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We've taken steps to try to reduce the impact on Slackbot and its response capabilities. Customers may notice signs of improvement, however, the impact may still be intermittent until full resolution. 

Other AI-powered features, including Search Answers, Meeting Notes, and Translation, are still experiencing issues due to the ongoing upstream problem. We're investigating similar alleviative actions for these features.

We'll provide another update in 60 m

title: Canva: Some users are experiencing issues with AI image and video generation. — Resolved
summary: This incident is now resolved. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We're continuing to engage with our third-party provider to find a solution. We're also exploring multiple avenues on our side to try to alleviate impact on Slackbot and AI-powered features until the upstream issue is resolved. 

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes until the impact is resolved for all users.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Our work on this issue is still ongoing. Users may continue to experience intermittent trouble with Slackbot responses and other Slack AI-powered features such as Search Answers, Meeting Notes, and Translation. 

Current status and actions being taken: We remain engaged with our third-party provider. 

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes until the impact is resolved for all users.

title: Slack: Major Outage
summary: Status changed from Operational to Major Outage

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and Slack AI services
summary:
We're investigating a new incident.

Current impact to end users: Some users may be experiencing trouble with Slackbot responses. Other Slack functionality that leverages AI services may also be experiencing issues. We're on the case and we'll provide an update within 30 minutes including further details on current actions being taken.

title: Google Workspace: Operational
summary: Status changed from Degraded Performance to Operational

title:
Google Workspace: **Summary**
AppSheet customers are experiencing redirection to asia-southeast.appsheet.com instead of their intended application URLs.
**Description**
Beginning on Wednesday, 2026-04-08 14:05 PDT, we are experiencing an issue with AppSheet that caused users to be erroneously redirected to the asia-southeast region.
Our engineers have identified the cause was due to a recent change and have reverted. Our internal telemetry shows the signs of recovery and are currently monitoring the recovery status. We expect full service recovery within an hour.
We will provide an update by Wednesday, 2026-04-08 16:30 PDT with current details
**Customer Symptoms**
Users are automatically redirected to asia-southeast.appsheet.com, which may cause "Forbidden" or 403 errors when attempting to access their apps.
**Workaround**
None at this time. — Resolved
summary: This incident has been resolved.

title:
Google Workspace: **Title:**
Customers may experience delays in receiving and sending emails.
**Description:**
We are aware of an issue with Gmail users experiencing delays in receiving and sending emails beginning at Wednesday, 2026-04-08 06:30 PDT.
Mitigation work is currently underway by our engineering team.
We do not have an ETA for mitigation at this point.
We will provide an update by Wednesday, 2026-04-08 12:00 PDT with current details.
**Symptoms:**
Customers may experience delays in receiving and sending emails.
**Workaround:**
None at this time. — Resolved
summary: This incident has been resolved.

**Customer Symptoms**

title: CrashPlan: Failing Logins for Incydr — Resolved
summary:
# **Root Case Analysis** 

## **Outage of Incydr Licensing Service** 

### **Issue Summary** 

**Background** 

At 21:35 UTC on March 23, 2026, an engineering change was released to all Incydr production environments. This change caused an issue with the Incydr service responsible for providing licensing information to other Incydr services. Whenever a license check was performed by an Incydr service, no licensing information was returned. 

**Services Impacted** 

This issue impacted the follow

title: Google Workspace: Operational
summary: Status changed from Major Outage to Operational

title:
Google Workspace: **Summary**
We are experiencing an issue with Google Keep where users may be unable to access keep.google.com via browser.
**Description**
The issue began on Friday, 2026-03-20 15:30 US/Pacific.
Our engineering team is aware of the situation and is actively implementing mitigations. We do not have any ETA at the moment.
We will provide the next update by Friday, 2026-03-20 21:00 US/Pacific.
**Customer Symptoms**
Impacted users may encounter connection timeouts or error pages (such as 502 Bad Gateway) when attempting to reach keep.google.com via a web browser. The Google Keep mobile applications are currently unaffected and remain operational.
**Workaround**
Users are able to use Google Keep via the Android or iOS mobile app. — Resolved
summary: This incident has been resolved.
